note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Right plantar measures aprx 1.7 x 3.4cm, depth 0.6cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - R ankle 1.0x2.0, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.

Wound note - Rightplantar. Meas 1.7x3.4x0.6cm. Light serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 40% gran, 60% slough. Periwound macerated. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Patel notified.
